privacy_boundary: Only public repository paths, hashes, commits, abstract queue semantics, and schema terms were used. Raw private chat, health or pet-health material, credentials, identifying personal data, and unreviewed uploads were excluded.
falsification_route: Fetch both deltas and the committed validator. Run the validator against base index efb8b5ca41a00a3484af1df112a81fc6a1b6d63a. Falsify source-level acceptance if the corrected successor reports unsupported kinds, duplicate IDs, or unknown CM references.
